listeningStage2Data.sentence: Heavy snow will _______ the entire playground tomorrow morning.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 這裡需要填入表示「覆蓋」的動詞，注意明早的天氣狀況喔。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 明天早上大雪將會覆蓋整個遊樂場。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The patient needs plenty of rest to _______ from the terrible flu.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 搭配介系詞 from，表示從疾病中「恢復」健康。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 這位病人需要充足的休息才能從嚴重的流感中恢復。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: Scientists hope to _______ new stars using this powerful telescope.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 意思是用望遠鏡去「發現」太空中未知的新星星。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 科學家們希望利用這台強大的望遠鏡來發現新的星星。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: If you spend your pocket money _______, you can save up for a new bicycle.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 用來形容花錢花得很聰明、很有智慧。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 如果你明智地花費你的零用錢，你就能存錢買一台新腳踏車。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The school had to _______ the sports meet because of the heavy rainstorm.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 因為暴雨，學校不得不「取消」原本要舉辦的運動會。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 因為暴雨的關係，學校不得不取消運動會。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The little boy loves to _______ beautiful seashells along the beach.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 去海灘上把漂亮的貝殼「收集」起來當作收藏。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 這個小男孩喜歡在沙灘沿岸收集漂亮的貝殼。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The morning _______ was so bad that many students arrived late for school.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 指的是路上車子很多、塞車的「交通」狀況。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 早上的交通非常糟糕，導致許多學生上學遲到了。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: My sister likes playing the piano, and she enjoys singing lovely songs _______.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 放句尾表示「也」，用來補充說明她不但會彈琴也會唱歌。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 我姐姐喜歡彈鋼琴，她也喜歡唱好聽的歌。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: You should forgive him; _______, he is just a child.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 通常放在句首，用來解釋原因，意思是「畢竟」，提醒對方多包容。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 你應該原諒他；畢竟，他只是個小孩。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: After climbing for three long hours, we _______ reached the top of the mountain.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 努力了很久，最後「終於」成功辦到了某件事。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 在爬了漫長的三個小時之後，我們終於到達了山頂。

listeningStage3Data.title: A Plan to Clean Up the Park (清理公園的計劃)

articleContent.en: Tim and Lily want to go to the park, but it is almost dark.
articleContent.zh: 提姆和莉莉想去公園，但天快黑了。

articleContent.en: They actually find too much trash near the big trees.
articleContent.zh: 他們實際上在大樹附近發現了太多的垃圾。

articleContent.en: The children will collect all the bottles and plastic bags tomorrow morning.
articleContent.zh: 孩子們明天早上會收集所有的瓶子和塑膠袋。

articleContent.en: Tim says they should spend their pocket money wisely to buy garbage bags as well.
articleContent.zh: 提姆說他們也應該明智地花零用錢來買垃圾袋。

articleContent.en: Finally, they can make the playground clean and beautiful again.
articleContent.zh: 終於，他們可以讓遊樂場再次變得乾淨又美麗。

questions.question: Who wants to clean up the park tomorrow morning?
What do the children find near the big trees?
When do Tim and Lily plan to collect the trash?
Where is the trash that the children want to collect?
options: Near the big trees in the park
questions.correct: Near the big trees in the park

questions.question: What will they buy with their pocket money?
Why do they want to collect the trash in the park?
options: To make the playground clean again
To get money from their teacher
questions.correct: To make the playground clean again

listeningStage3Data.title: A Rainy School Day (下雨的上學日)

articleContent.en: Today, the morning traffic is very slow because of the heavy rain.
articleContent.zh: 今天，因為下雨的關係，早上的交通非常緩慢。

articleContent.en: The school bus has a long delay on the road.
articleContent.zh: 校車在路上遭遇了很長的延遲。

articleContent.en: Kevin is still waiting at the bus stop, and he is very wet.
articleContent.zh: 凱文仍然在公車站等待，而且他全身都濕透了。

articleContent.en: The principal decided to cancel the morning meeting after all.
articleContent.zh: 校長畢竟還是決定取消了早會。

articleContent.en: Thick mud will cover the school sports field today.
articleContent.zh: 泥濘今天將會覆蓋學校的運動場。

questions.question: Who is waiting at the bus stop in the rain?
What happened to the school bus on the road?
When is the traffic very slow and terrible?
Where will the thick mud cover today?
What did the principal decide to do because of the rain?
Why did the principal cancel the morning meeting?
options: Because the heavy rain caused bad traffic and delays
Because the students wanted to play outside
Because it was a special holiday
questions.correct: Because the heavy rain caused bad traffic and delays

listeningStage3Data.title: Grandpa's Afternoon Nap (爺爺的下午點心與小睡)

articleContent.en: Grandpa is sleeping on the sofa, and he begins to snore loudly.
articleContent.zh: 爺爺正在沙發上睡覺，而且他開始大聲打呼。

articleContent.en: The white blanket will cover his feet to keep him warm.
articleContent.zh: 白色的毛毯會覆蓋他的腳以保持溫暖。

articleContent.en: He needs to recover his energy after working in the garden.
articleContent.zh: 在花園工作之後，他需要恢復體力。

articleContent.en: He hopes to discover new flowers in the yard later.
articleContent.zh: 他希望稍後能在院子裡發現新的花朵。

articleContent.en: Actually, grandpa always sleeps for thirty minutes after lunch.
articleContent.zh: 事實上，爺爺午飯後總是睡三十分鐘。

questions.question: Who is sleeping and snoring on the sofa?
What does Grandpa do that makes a loud noise?
When does Grandpa always sleep for thirty minutes?
Where did Grandpa work before taking a nap?
What will cover Grandpa's feet to keep him warm?
Why does Grandpa need to sleep on the sofa?
options: To recover his energy after working
Because he has nothing to do
questions.correct: To recover his energy after working

readingStage1Data.sentence: Heavy snow will _______ the entire playground tomorrow morning.
readingStage1Data.hint: 這裡需要填入表示「覆蓋」的動詞，注意明早的天氣狀況喔。
readingStage1Data.translation: 明天早上大雪將會覆蓋整個遊樂場。

readingStage1Data.sentence: The patient needs plenty of rest to _______ from the terrible flu.
readingStage1Data.hint: 搭配介系詞 from，表示從疾病中「恢復」健康。
readingStage1Data.translation: 這位病人需要充足的休息才能從嚴重的流感中恢復。

readingStage1Data.sentence: Scientists hope to _______ new stars using this powerful telescope.
readingStage1Data.hint: 意思是用望遠鏡去「發現」太空中未知的新星星。
readingStage1Data.translation: 科學家們希望利用這台強大的望遠鏡來發現新的星星。

readingStage1Data.sentence: If you spend your pocket money _______, you can save up for a new bicycle.
readingStage1Data.hint: 用來形容花錢花得很聰明、很有智慧。
readingStage1Data.translation: 如果你明智地花費你的零用錢，你就能存錢買一台新腳踏車。

readingStage1Data.sentence: The school had to _______ the sports meet because of the heavy rainstorm.
readingStage1Data.hint: 因為暴雨，學校不得不「取消」原本要舉辦的運動會。
readingStage1Data.translation: 因為暴雨的關係，學校不得不取消運動會。

readingStage1Data.sentence: The little boy loves to _______ beautiful seashells along the beach.
readingStage1Data.hint: 去海灘上把漂亮的貝殼「收集」起來當作收藏。
readingStage1Data.translation: 這個小男孩喜歡在沙灘沿岸收集漂亮的貝殼。

readingStage1Data.sentence: The morning _______ was so bad that many students arrived late for school.
readingStage1Data.hint: 指的是路上車子很多、塞車的「交通」狀況。
readingStage1Data.translation: 早上的交通非常糟糕，導致許多學生上學遲到了。

readingStage1Data.sentence: My sister likes playing the piano, and she enjoys singing lovely songs _______.
readingStage1Data.hint: 放句尾表示「也」，用來補充說明她不但會彈琴也會唱歌。
readingStage1Data.translation: 我姐姐喜歡彈鋼琴，她也喜歡唱好聽的歌。

readingStage1Data.sentence: You should forgive him; _______, he is just a child.
readingStage1Data.hint: 通常放在句首，用來解釋原因，意思是「畢竟」，提醒對方多包容。
readingStage1Data.translation: 你應該原諒他；畢竟，他只是個小孩。

readingStage1Data.sentence: After climbing for three long hours, we _______ reached the top of the mountain.
readingStage1Data.hint: 努力了很久，最後「終於」成功辦到了某件事。
readingStage1Data.translation: 在爬了漫長的三個小時之後，我們終於到達了山頂。

readingStage2Data.title: Robin Hood Sharing Wisely (羅賓漢的明智分享)
readingStage2Data.article: Long ago, Robin Hood lived in the green forest. He would {{1}} gold from rich people. He always shared the money {{2}} with poor villagers. To avoid the Sheriff, Robin had to {{3}} his horse tracks carefully. He spent his days helping people and hiding in the woods.

blanks.hint: 這裡需要填入動詞，表示羅賓漢從富人那裡「收集」或拿走黃金。
blanks.translation: 他會從富人那裡收集黃金。

blanks.hint: 這裡需要一個副詞來修飾動詞 shared，表示「明智地」分配這些錢財。
blanks.translation: 他總是明智地與貧窮的村民分享這些錢。

blanks.hint: 為了不被抓到，他必須把行蹤「覆蓋」或掩蓋起來。
blanks.translation: 為了避開郡長，羅賓漢必須小心地覆蓋他的馬蹄印。

readingStage2Data.title: The Sleeping Princess and Her Recovery (睡美人與她的康復)
readingStage2Data.article: The princess pricked her finger and fell into a deep sleep. For one hundred years, the castle was {{1}} dark and quiet. A thick forest came to {{2}} the whole palace. Finally, a brave prince arrived to {{3}} the beautiful princess. When she opened her eyes, everyone was happy.

blanks.hint: 表示過了一百年，城堡「仍然」保持著黑暗與安靜。
blanks.translation: 一百年來，城堡依然黑暗而安靜。

blanks.hint: 森林長大並把整個宮殿「覆蓋」或遮蔽了起來。
blanks.translation: 一片茂密的森林前來覆蓋了整個宮殿。

blanks.hint: 這裡指王子讓公主從長眠中「恢復」清醒、救回公主。
blanks.translation: 終於，一位勇敢的王子前來恢復（喚醒）了美麗的公主。

readingStage2Data.title: Alice's Wonderful Discovery (愛麗絲的奇妙發現)
readingStage2Data.article: Alice was sitting by the river when she saw a strange rabbit. The rabbit said there was a long {{1}}, and it ran away. Alice followed it and fell down a deep hole. She did not stop; she was {{2}} at the bottom of the magical world. There, she would {{3}} many talking animals and strange things.

blanks.hint: 兔子看著手錶抱怨時間「延遲」或耽誤了，表示自己要遲到了。
blanks.translation: 兔子說有很長的延遲，然後就跑開了。

blanks.hint: 掉落了很久之後，愛麗絲「終於」到達了奇幻世界的底部。
blanks.translation: 她沒有停下來；她終於來到了魔法世界的底部。

blanks.hint: 在這個新世界裡，她去「發現」或探索未知的奇妙事物。
blanks.translation: 在那裡，她將發現許多會說話的動物和奇怪的事情。

readingStage3Data.title: Robin Hood Sharing Wisely (羅賓漢的明智分享)

articleContent.en: Long ago, Robin Hood lived in the green forest.
articleContent.zh: 很久以前，羅賓漢住在綠色森林裡。

articleContent.en: He would collect gold from rich people.
articleContent.zh: 他會從富人那裡收集黃金。

articleContent.en: He always shared the money wisely with poor villagers.
articleContent.zh: 他總是明智地與貧窮的村民分享這些錢。

articleContent.en: To avoid the Sheriff, Robin had to cover his horse tracks carefully.
articleContent.zh: 為了避開郡長，羅賓漢必須小心地覆蓋他的馬蹄印。

articleContent.en: He spent his days helping people and hiding in the woods.
articleContent.zh: 他在幫助人們和躲在樹林中度過了他的日子。

questions.question: Who lived in the green forest and helped poor villagers?
options: A rich merchant from the town

questions.question: What did Robin Hood do with the heavy gold?
options: He shared it wisely with poor villagers.
He hid it under a big rock forever.
He used it to buy an expensive castle.
questions.correct: He shared it wisely with poor villagers.

questions.question: When did this story about Robin Hood happen?
Where did Robin Hood hide from the Sheriff?
What did Robin Hood have to cover carefully?
options: The golden coins in his pocket

questions.question: Why did Robin Hood cover his horse tracks?
options: To play a funny game with his friends
To find new flowers in the yard

readingStage3Data.title: The Sleeping Princess and Her Recovery (睡美人與她的康復)

articleContent.en: The princess pricked her finger and fell into a deep sleep.
articleContent.zh: 公主刺破了手指，陷入了沉睡。

articleContent.en: For one hundred years, the castle was still dark and quiet.
articleContent.zh: 一百年來，城堡依然黑暗而安靜。

articleContent.en: A thick forest came to cover the whole palace.
articleContent.zh: 一片茂密的森林前來覆蓋了整個宮殿。

articleContent.en: Finally, a brave prince arrived to recover the beautiful princess.
articleContent.zh: 終於，一位勇敢的王子前來恢復（喚醒）了美麗的公主。

articleContent.en: When she opened her eyes, everyone was happy.
articleContent.zh: 當她睜開眼睛時，每個人都很高興。

questions.question: Who fell into a deep sleep for one hundred years?
What happened to the castle during those one hundred years?
options: It was still dark and quiet.
It became a noisy city market.
It was destroyed by a big fire.
questions.correct: It was still dark and quiet.

questions.question: When did the brave prince finally arrive at the palace?
options: Before the princess went to bed

questions.question: Where did the thick forest grow to cover everything?
What grew over the castle to hide it from the world?
options: A river of milk and honey

questions.question: Why was everyone in the castle happy at the end?
options: Because the princess opened her eyes and recovered
Because they found a lot of gold in the garden
Because they were going to move to another country
questions.correct: Because the princess opened her eyes and recovered

readingStage3Data.title: Alice's Wonderful Discovery (愛麗絲的奇妙發現)

articleContent.en: Alice was sitting by the river when she saw a strange rabbit.
articleContent.zh: 愛麗絲坐在河邊時，看到了一隻奇怪的兔子。

articleContent.en: The rabbit said there was a long delay, and it ran away.
articleContent.zh: 兔子說有很長的延遲（來不及了），然後就跑開了。

articleContent.en: Alice followed it and fell down a deep hole.
articleContent.zh: 愛麗絲跟著牠，掉進了一個深洞裡。

articleContent.en: She did not stop; she was finally at the bottom of the magical world.
articleContent.zh: 她沒有停下來；她終於來到了魔法世界的底部。

articleContent.en: There, she would discover many talking animals and strange things.
articleContent.zh: 在那裡，她將發現許多會說話的動物和奇怪的事情。

questions.question: Who saw a strange rabbit while sitting by the river?
What did the rabbit say before it ran away?
options: It wanted to eat some fresh carrots.
It lost its golden keys in the river.

questions.question: When did Alice fall down into the deep hole?
options: After she followed the strange rabbit
Before she arrived at the river
Late at night when she was sleeping
questions.correct: After she followed the strange rabbit

questions.question: Where was Alice sitting at the beginning of the story?
What did Alice find after falling to the bottom of the hole?
options: A magical world with talking animals
A large box full of old books
A magical world with sleeping animals
questions.correct: A magical world with talking animals

questions.question: Why did Alice run after the strange rabbit?
options: Because she was curious about it
Because the rabbit took her pocket money
Because she wanted to catch it
questions.correct: Because she was curious about it
